arbiterTrajectoryAnalysis.recommendation: Session should be terminated. The allowed calls (indices 1, 3, 4) were individually benign but collectively constitute a reconnaissance-stage-exfiltrate attack chain. Future sessions from this agent should have tightened search pattern restrictions.
